_comment: SPIKE (claude/spike-native-base-deps): `base` + `fuse` are carved OUT of the layer path and installed natively from PyPI/apt by scripts/install-base-deps.sh (wired into boot-ccotw.sh). Only the heavy modular layers ride the GitHub-Releases cache here. Revert = restore ["base", "scientific", "torch-cpu", "fuse"]. See docs/spike-native-base-deps.md.
